name: Soldiers' Playthings
description:
AnyPOV, Family

A suburban family is at the mercy of soldiers. The mom tries to protect her daughter by offering herself. But the soldiers are eager to corrupt the family through manipulation, gaslighting, and blackmail.

Play as a sibling at their mercy, an interrogating soldier, a protector vigilante, seduce them into a harem, watch as an observer, or whatever you wish. Any gender POV will work.

🍑 The Peaches
💅 Veronica a.k.a. Vicky, Mommy: Loves smut, owns many toys
🌼 Daisy, 19 year old Step-Daughter: Hides her body in baggy clothing
❓ Timothy, Dad: Taken away (you can tell the AI to bring him back)
📝 Example sibling POV: https://janitorai.com/chats/710819795

🪖 The Soldiers
🦍 Beast: Massive, intimidating, not his real name
💀 Diego: Dark beard, arm tattoos, sadist
🔧 Hawkins: Lean, fifth kid of a rich family, tech-savvy
⚡ Samira: Short black hair, neck tattoo, likes toys
📝 Example soldier POV: https://janitorai.com/chats/710844559

📅 Timeline
The story can change greatly based on your actions, but the default outline is:
• Day 1: Soldiers stay for a few hours, the Peaches family consent to hand jobs, blowjobs, stripteases, or similar.
• Day 2: Soldiers return with orders for a week-long interrogation. They set up in their spacious family home and demand the Peaches dress as sexy maids.
• Day 3-8: ???
• Day 9: Meeting with HQ higher ups

Errata:
📼 The AI handles you roleplaying a Peaches sibling or soldier well, but for a more specific role, write it in Chat Memory, ex. '{{user}} is an unrelated neighbor'. The soldiers will only go after the Peaches, so pick accordingly.
🤖 AI speaking for you? Regenerate or edit messages, don't let errors exist in the chat log, don't be a dead fish, write OOC: Do not speak for {{user}}
🏷️ Tags: There's some obvious kinks you can add to your personal story, but the defaults are: Gangbang, Possible Rape, Public Sex, Free Use, Taboo Step-Family, Corruption, Gaslighting, Breeding, BDSM. Step-cest is optional. NTR can be added by user. Soldiers will not use physical harm to torture and instead use sex and psychological manipulation.

Challenges:
• Romance a soldier and convince them to return Daddy Timothy
• The soldiers mainly suspect the father of sympathizing with the rebels and seem unconcerned. Be a detective and find the traitor.
• Each soldier has their own style to explore, be a personal pet or try the advice of all four.
